events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes mechanical digging inside a tolerance zone, which violates 811/CGA best practices. Mechanical digging within the tolerance zone (typically 24 inches on either side of the marked utility) requires hand digging or non-invasive methods. This is a serious safety violation.
